evals.prompt: 帮我看看这个项目有什么问题，挑挑毛病
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive multi-perspective review report covering type safety, architecture, testing, security, etc. with prioritized findings (P0-P3), scores per dimension, and a remediation roadmap.

evals.prompt: Do a quick code audit focusing on security and testing only
evals.expected_output: A focused report covering only Security Auditor and Test Inspector perspectives, with findings and scores for those two dimensions.

evals.prompt: review this project's code quality and give me a health check report
evals.expected_output: Full 10-perspective review with all reviewers spawned in parallel, comprehensive report with scores, findings, commendations, and roadmap.
